los_multiplier_bid.description: LoS score multiplier applied when a lead is in active bidding phase

los_multiplier_work.description: LoS score multiplier applied when a lead is in active work phase

los_penalty_tracking.description: LoS penalty (points) deducted when a lead has been viewed/tracked without conversion

los_penalty_saving.description: LoS penalty (points) deducted when a lead is saved but not acted on

los_base_cap.description: Maximum LoS base score before multipliers are applied

los_base_divisor.description: Divisor applied to construction cost when computing the LoS base score

stall_penalty_precon.description: Days without phase progression before a pre-construction lead is considered stalled

stall_penalty_active.description: Days without phase progression before an active-construction lead is considered stalled

expired_threshold_days.description: Negative offset (days) used to classify a permit as expired; permits older than this are excluded from leads

liar_gate_threshold.description: Minimum fraction of active permits with cost estimate before the Liar's Gate override triggers (Spec 83 §4)

coa_stall_threshold.description: Days without CoA update before a linked application is considered stalled

inspection_stall_days.description: Days without inspection activity before an Active Inspection permit is reclassified as Stalled

stale_closure_abort_pct.description: Maximum percentage of permits that may be closed in a single run; exceeding this aborts the pipeline as a safety guard against partial CKAN downloads

pending_closed_grace_days.description: Days a permit must remain in Pending Closed status before being promoted to Closed

pre_permit_expiry_months.description: Months after CoA approval before an unlinked Pre-Permit lead is reclassified as Expired/Abandoned

pre_permit_stale_months.description: Months after CoA approval before an unlinked Pre-Permit is flagged as stale in the aging audit (early-warning bucket)

coa_freshness_warn_days.description: Days since last CoA ingestion before assert-coa-freshness emits a portal-rot WARN (data may be frozen in CKAN)

scrape_early_phase_threshold_pct.description: Scrape coverage percentage below which the staleness monitor treats stale permits as WARN (early phase) rather than FAIL (production)

scrape_stale_days.description: Days since last scrape_at before a permit inspection is considered stale in the staleness monitor

calibration_min_sample_size.description: Minimum number of historical leads required before trade calibration data is trusted

urban_coverage_ratio.description: GFA coverage ratio applied to urban parcels when estimating construction area (Spec 83 §3)

suburban_coverage_ratio.description: GFA coverage ratio applied to suburban parcels when estimating construction area (Spec 83 §3)

trust_threshold_pct.description: Minimum fraction of permits with parcel-linked cost data before a coverage ratio is trusted (Spec 83 §4)

commercial_shell_multiplier.description: Discount multiplier applied to commercial shell-and-core permits for cost estimation (Spec 86)

placeholder_cost_threshold.description: Construction cost values below this threshold (CAD) are treated as placeholder/zero and excluded from analysis

cost_outlier_ceiling_cad.description: Construction cost ceiling (CAD) above which a permit est_const_cost is flagged as a data-quality outlier (assert-data-bounds E7). $500M was too tight for legitimate Toronto megaprojects (hospitals, transit stations, mixed-use towers); raised to $2B.

desc_null_rate_warn_pct.description: Maximum acceptable percentage of recent permits (last 24h) with a NULL description before a data-quality warning is emitted

builder_null_rate_warn_pct.description: Maximum acceptable percentage of recent permits (last 24h) with a NULL builder_name before a data-quality warning is emitted

cost_est_null_rate_warn_pct.description: Maximum acceptable percentage of NULL estimated_cost rows in cost_estimates before a data-quality warning is emitted

cost_est_min_tiers.description: Minimum number of distinct cost_tier values expected in cost_estimates; fewer triggers a data-quality warning

calibration_freshness_warn_hours.description: Hours since last compute_timing_calibration run after which the timing_calibration table is considered stale and a warning is emitted

lifecycle_unclassified_max.description: Maximum number of non-terminal permits/CoAs with a NULL lifecycle_phase before assert-lifecycle-phase-distribution emits a FAIL (strongest correctness gate)

scraper_error_rate_warn_pct.description: Proxy error rate percentage at or above which assert-network-health emits a FAIL (proxy_errors / permits_attempted * 100)

scraper_latency_p50_warn_ms.description: Scraper latency p50 (ms) at or above which assert-network-health emits a WARN

scraper_empty_streak_warn.description: Number of consecutive empty scraper responses at or above which assert-network-health emits a WARN (WAF shadow-ban detection)

urgency_overdue_days.description: Days past the predicted start date (as a positive integer) before a trade forecast is classified as 'overdue' rather than 'delayed' (code: daysUntil <= -urgency_overdue_days)

urgency_upcoming_days.description: Days until the predicted start date at or below which a trade forecast is classified as 'upcoming' rather than 'on_time'

score_tier_elite.description: Minimum opportunity_score (0-100) for a lead to be classified as 'elite' tier in the scoring distribution telemetry

score_tier_strong.description: Minimum opportunity_score (0-100) for a lead to be classified as 'strong' tier (below elite) in the scoring distribution telemetry

score_tier_moderate.description: Minimum opportunity_score (0-100) for a lead to be classified as 'moderate' tier (below strong) in the scoring distribution telemetry; scores below this are 'low'

los_decay_divisor.description: Scales the asymptotic decay curve for competition penalties (rawPenalty / this = decayFactor; higher = gentler decay). At 25, a single high-intensity tracker halves the score.

cost_model_coverage_warn_pct.description: Minimum percentage of processed permits that must receive a non-null cost estimate; below this threshold the cost estimate run emits a WARN verdict

coa_match_conf_high.description: CoA→permit match confidence at or above which the link is classified as 'high confidence' in the link-coa run summary

coa_match_conf_medium.description: CoA→permit match confidence floor for the 'medium confidence' bucket (link-coa summary: >= this AND < high); also used as the low-confidence boundary in the CoA snapshot

snapshot_coa_conf_high.description: Minimum linked_confidence for a CoA application to be counted as 'high_confidence' in the refresh-snapshot dashboard metrics

spatial_match_max_distance_m.description: Maximum metres between a permit geocode and a parcel centroid for a spatial match (Strategy 3 in link-parcels)

spatial_match_confidence.description: Confidence score assigned to a permit→parcel spatial match (Strategy 3); upgraded to 0.90 if permit geocode falls inside the parcel polygon

coa_unmatched_threshold_pct.description: Day-1 threshold (percent) for unmatched CoAs in link-coa-to-parcels (Spec 42 §6.5 step 9). Above this, audit_table verdict is WARN (not FAIL). Recalibrate post-burn-in.

coa_parcel_conf_tier1a.description: Confidence score for CoA Tier 1a exact-address parcel match in link-coa-to-parcels (addr_num + street_name_normalized both match). DISTINCT from coa_match_conf_high which is consumed by link-coa.js for CoA→permit matching.

coa_parcel_conf_tier1b.description: Confidence score for CoA Tier 1b name-only parcel match in link-coa-to-parcels (street_num absent, only street_name_normalized matches). DISTINCT from coa_match_conf_medium which is consumed by link-coa.js.

coa_scope_unmapped_threshold_pct.description: Day-1 threshold (percent) for unmapped scope_tags in classify-coa-scope (Spec 42 §6.5 step 5). Above this, audit_table verdict is WARN (not FAIL). Recalibrate post-burn-in once production-shape data is known.

coa_trades_unmapped_threshold_pct.description: Day-1 threshold (percent) for CoAs with non-NULL scope_tags but zero trade matches in classify-coa-trades (Spec 42 §6.8 row 667; R5.4 R8 fold #1). Variance-only CoAs (severance, setback, minor-variance) legitimately produce zero trades, so a non-zero threshold is the correct semantic — the spec literal `== 0 FAIL` would be a permanent FAIL. Set to 20% for first burn-in; recalibrate post-prod once tag distribution is known.

coa_cost_coverage_threshold_pct.description: Day-1 threshold (percent) for CoAs producing a non-NULL estimated_cost in compute-coa-cost-estimates (Spec 42 §6.8 row 668; R5.5 fold #13). Below threshold → audit_table verdict WARN. Set to 70% for first burn-in (Spec 42 §6.3 success target is 80% — threshold gives latitude for early-run coverage gaps from missing parcel links, scope tags, or trade rates). Tune up to 80% once R5.2-R5.4 are at steady-state coverage.

coa_inherit_from_permit_min_confidence.description: Minimum fuzzy-match confidence for link-coa.js to inherit a linked permit's authoritative lat/long + ward into the matched CoA (R5.6 Part A — lead-identity continuity, Spec 42 §6.X). Default 0.60 covers Tier 1a (0.95), Tier 1b (0.85), and Tier 2a (0.60) but EXCLUDES Tier 2b (0.50, name-only + permit ward NULL — too speculative for dense urban streets) and Tier 3 (≤0.50, description FTS). Raised from initial 0.50 design per 4-reviewer plan-review (Gemini + DeepSeek + observability worktree converged on Tier 2b risk).

massing_shed_threshold_sqm.description: Building footprint area (m²) below which a secondary structure is classified as a shed in link-massing

massing_garage_max_sqm.description: Maximum building footprint area (m²) for a secondary structure to be classified as a garage in link-massing

massing_nearest_max_distance_m.description: Maximum haversine distance (metres) for the nearest-building fallback in link-massing when no polygon match is found

wsib_fuzzy_match_threshold.description: pg_trgm similarity threshold for Tier 3 fuzzy builder→WSIB name matching; controls both the GIN index filter and the WHERE similarity() comparison

snowplow_buffer_days.description: Days added to today when the Historic Snowplow snaps a fallback-anchor forecast out of the deep past (spec 85 §3). Higher = more lead time before the window opens.

calibration_default_median_days.description: Fallback median days used by compute-trade-forecasts when no calibration data exists for a phase transition (level-5 default)

calibration_default_p25_days.description: Fallback p25 (25th-percentile days) used by compute-trade-forecasts when no calibration data exists for a phase transition (level-5 default)

calibration_default_p75_days.description: Fallback p75 (75th-percentile days) used by compute-trade-forecasts when no calibration data exists for a phase transition (level-5 default)

profiling_coverage_pass_pct.description: assert-global-coverage: coverage >= this integer pct -> PASS (spec 49)

profiling_coverage_warn_pct.description: assert-global-coverage: coverage >= this integer pct -> WARN; below -> FAIL (spec 49)

lifecycle_issued_stall_days.description: Days since Permit Issued (no passed inspection) before lifecycle_stalled flag is set

lifecycle_inspection_stall_days.description: Days since last inspection activity before lifecycle_stalled flag is set

lifecycle_p7a_max_days.description: Max days since Permit Issued for P7a (fresh-issued) bucket; above this is P7b

lifecycle_p7b_max_days.description: Max days since Permit Issued for P7b (active-issued) bucket; above this is P7c

lifecycle_orphan_stall_days.description: Days since issued for an orphan permit (no parent BLD/CMB) with no passed inspection before it degrades from O2 (active) to O3 (stalled orphan)

lead_view_retention_days.description: PIPEDA/GDPR retention window in days for lead_views rows; rows older than this are purged nightly by purge-lead-views.js

lifecycle_band_p3_min.description: Min count for lifecycle_phase=P3 (Intake) before assert-lifecycle-phase-distribution emits a band-violation FAIL. Calibrated against 2026-05-07 snapshot (843) ±15%.

lifecycle_band_p3_max.description: Max count for lifecycle_phase=P3 (Intake) before band-violation FAIL.

lifecycle_band_p4_min.description: Min count for lifecycle_phase=P4 (Examination/review) before band-violation FAIL.

lifecycle_band_p5_min.description: Min count for lifecycle_phase=P5 (On Hold/deficiency notice).

lifecycle_band_p5_max.description: Max count for lifecycle_phase=P5 (On Hold/deficiency notice).

lifecycle_band_p6_min.description: Min count for lifecycle_phase=P6 (Ready for issuance / approved).

lifecycle_band_p6_max.description: Max count for lifecycle_phase=P6 (Ready for issuance / approved).

lifecycle_band_p7a_min.description: Min count for lifecycle_phase=P7a (issued, fresh — ≤30 days bucket).

lifecycle_band_p7b_min.description: Min count for lifecycle_phase=P7b (issued, active — 31–90 days bucket).

lifecycle_band_p7c_min.description: Min count for lifecycle_phase=P7c (issued, bulk — >90 days, no inspections recorded).

lifecycle_band_p7d_min.description: Min count for lifecycle_phase=P7d (issued, not started).

lifecycle_band_p7d_max.description: Max count for lifecycle_phase=P7d (issued, not started).

lifecycle_band_p8_min.description: Min count for lifecycle_phase=P8 (revision in progress).

lifecycle_band_p8_max.description: Max count for lifecycle_phase=P8 (revision in progress).

lifecycle_band_p18_min.description: Min count for lifecycle_phase=P18 (Inspection-status fallback when no detailed inspection records).

lifecycle_band_p9_p17_agg_min.description: Min sum of permits in P9–P17 (detailed inspection-stage phases). Wide tolerance — current scraper coverage ~5.5%; raise as inspection ingestion scales up.

lifecycle_band_p9_p17_agg_max.description: Max sum of permits in P9–P17. Wide upper bound until inspection ingestion scales up.

lifecycle_band_o1_min.description: Min count for lifecycle_phase=O1 (active orphan trade permit). Per Spec 84 §7 O-phases scope ONLY to standalone trade permits (HVA/PLB/DRN); BLDs are never orphan post-WF3.

lifecycle_band_o1_max.description: Max count for lifecycle_phase=O1 (active orphan trade permit).

lifecycle_band_o2_min.description: Min count for lifecycle_phase=O2 (orphan trade permit, mid-lifecycle).

lifecycle_band_o2_max.description: Max count for lifecycle_phase=O2 (orphan trade permit, mid-lifecycle).

lifecycle_band_o3_min.description: Min count for lifecycle_phase=O3 (stalled orphan trade permit, beyond lifecycle_orphan_stall_days threshold).

lifecycle_band_o3_max.description: Max count for lifecycle_phase=O3 (stalled orphan trade permit).

lifecycle_band_coa_p1_min.description: Min count for CoA lifecycle_phase=P1 (application received). Small counts; ±30% tolerance.

lifecycle_band_coa_p1_max.description: Max count for CoA lifecycle_phase=P1 (application received).

lifecycle_band_coa_p2_min.description: Min count for CoA lifecycle_phase=P2 (committee decision rendered).

lifecycle_band_coa_p2_max.description: Max count for CoA lifecycle_phase=P2 (committee decision rendered).

lifecycle_cross_stalled_threshold.description: Max count of permits with enriched_status=Stalled but lifecycle_stalled=false before the assertion FAILs. Detects classifier ↔ scraper signal divergence.

lifecycle_cross_active_inspection_thresh.description: Max count of permits with enriched_status=Active Inspection NOT in P9-P18/O1-O3 before the assertion FAILs.

lifecycle_cross_issued_threshold.description: Max count of permits with enriched_status=Permit Issued NOT in P7a/b/c/d/P8/P18/O1-O3 before the assertion FAILs.

staleness_max_stale_over_30d.description: Max permits with last inspection scrape older than scrape_stale_days before assert-staleness emits FAIL (Spec 44 step 7). Sized against the 2026-05-08 snapshot (6,514 stale → WARN). Tighten to <2000 once scrape coverage ≥50% per Spec 38.

staleness_min_coverage_pct.description: Scraped/total ratio (percent) below which assert-staleness emits an informational WARN row. Per Spec 44 §3.5 informational, not a halt.

staleness_max_days_stale.description: Single-permit max_days_stale ceiling (days). Above this assert-staleness emits an informational WARN row indicating permits are aging beyond expectation. Not a halt.

lifecycle_seq_band_1_min.description: Min row count for lifecycle_seq=1 (Received). Catalog snapshot rows_count=10; 2-branch continuous formula. Recalibrated in E.5.

lifecycle_seq_band_1_max.description: Max row count for lifecycle_seq=1 (Received). Catalog snapshot rows_count=10; 2-branch continuous formula (NULL=no upper bound, INFO-only). Recalibrated in E.5.

lifecycle_seq_band_2_min.description: Min row count for lifecycle_seq=2 (Accepted). Catalog snapshot rows_count=279; 2-branch continuous formula. Recalibrated in E.5.

lifecycle_seq_band_2_max.description: Max row count for lifecycle_seq=2 (Accepted). Catalog snapshot rows_count=279; 2-branch continuous formula (NULL=no upper bound, INFO-only). Recalibrated in E.5.

lifecycle_seq_band_3_min.description: Min row count for lifecycle_seq=3 (Notice Prep). Catalog snapshot rows_count=54; 2-branch continuous formula. Recalibrated in E.5.

lifecycle_seq_band_3_max.description: Max row count for lifecycle_seq=3 (Notice Prep). Catalog snapshot rows_count=54; 2-branch continuous formula (NULL=no upper bound, INFO-only). Recalibrated in E.5.

lifecycle_seq_band_4_min.description: Min row count for lifecycle_seq=4 (Notice Prepared). Catalog snapshot rows_count=74; 2-branch continuous formula. Recalibrated in E.5.

lifecycle_seq_band_4_max.description: Max row count for lifecycle_seq=4 (Notice Prepared). Catalog snapshot rows_count=74; 2-branch continuous formula (NULL=no upper bound, INFO-only). Recalibrated in E.5.

lifecycle_seq_band_5_min.description: Min row count for lifecycle_seq=5 (Tentatively Scheduled). Catalog snapshot rows_count=118; 2-branch continuous formula. Recalibrated in E.5.

lifecycle_seq_band_5_max.description: Max row count for lifecycle_seq=5 (Tentatively Scheduled). Catalog snapshot rows_count=118; 2-branch continuous formula (NULL=no upper bound, INFO-only). Recalibrated in E.5.

lifecycle_seq_band_6_min.description: Min row count for lifecycle_seq=6 (Hearing Scheduled). Catalog snapshot rows_count=317; 2-branch continuous formula. Recalibrated in E.5.

lifecycle_seq_band_6_max.description: Max row count for lifecycle_seq=6 (Hearing Scheduled). Catalog snapshot rows_count=317; 2-branch continuous formula (NULL=no upper bound, INFO-only). Recalibrated in E.5.

lifecycle_seq_band_7_min.description: Min row count for lifecycle_seq=7 (Hearing Rescheduled). Catalog snapshot rows_count=1; 2-branch continuous formula. Recalibrated in E.5.

lifecycle_seq_band_7_max.description: Max row count for lifecycle_seq=7 (Hearing Rescheduled). Catalog snapshot rows_count=1; 2-branch continuous formula (NULL=no upper bound, INFO-only). Recalibrated in E.5.

lifecycle_seq_band_8_min.description: Min row count for lifecycle_seq=8 (Postponed). Catalog snapshot rows_count=292; 2-branch continuous formula. Recalibrated in E.5.

lifecycle_seq_band_8_max.description: Max row count for lifecycle_seq=8 (Postponed). Catalog snapshot rows_count=292; 2-branch continuous formula (NULL=no upper bound, INFO-only). Recalibrated in E.5.

lifecycle_seq_band_9_min.description: Min row count for lifecycle_seq=9 (Deferred). Catalog snapshot rows_count=270; 2-branch continuous formula. Recalibrated in E.5.

lifecycle_seq_band_9_max.description: Max row count for lifecycle_seq=9 (Deferred). Catalog snapshot rows_count=270; 2-branch continuous formula (NULL=no upper bound, INFO-only). Recalibrated in E.5.

lifecycle_seq_band_10_min.description: Min row count for lifecycle_seq=10 (Conditional Consent). Catalog snapshot rows_count=326; 2-branch continuous formula. Recalibrated in E.5.

lifecycle_seq_band_10_max.description: Max row count for lifecycle_seq=10 (Conditional Consent). Catalog snapshot rows_count=326; 2-branch continuous formula (NULL=no upper bound, INFO-only). Recalibrated in E.5.

lifecycle_seq_band_11_min.description: Min row count for lifecycle_seq=11 (Approved). Catalog snapshot rows_count=246; 2-branch continuous formula. Recalibrated in E.5.

lifecycle_seq_band_11_max.description: Max row count for lifecycle_seq=11 (Approved). Catalog snapshot rows_count=246; 2-branch continuous formula (NULL=no upper bound, INFO-only). Recalibrated in E.5.

lifecycle_seq_band_12_min.description: Min row count for lifecycle_seq=12 (Approved + Conditions). Catalog snapshot rows_count=554; 2-branch continuous formula. Recalibrated in E.5.

lifecycle_seq_band_12_max.description: Max row count for lifecycle_seq=12 (Approved + Conditions). Catalog snapshot rows_count=554; 2-branch continuous formula (NULL=no upper bound, INFO-only). Recalibrated in E.5.

lifecycle_seq_band_13_min.description: Min row count for lifecycle_seq=13 (Refused). Catalog snapshot rows_count=59; 2-branch continuous formula. Recalibrated in E.5.

lifecycle_seq_band_13_max.description: Max row count for lifecycle_seq=13 (Refused). Catalog snapshot rows_count=59; 2-branch continuous formula (NULL=no upper bound, INFO-only). Recalibrated in E.5.

lifecycle_seq_band_14_min.description: Min row count for lifecycle_seq=14 (Final & Binding). Catalog snapshot rows_count=1; 2-branch continuous formula. Recalibrated in E.5.

lifecycle_seq_band_14_max.description: Max row count for lifecycle_seq=14 (Final & Binding). Catalog snapshot rows_count=1; 2-branch continuous formula (NULL=no upper bound, INFO-only). Recalibrated in E.5.

lifecycle_seq_band_15_min.description: Min row count for lifecycle_seq=15 (Awaiting Expiry). Catalog snapshot rows_count=24; 2-branch continuous formula. Recalibrated in E.5.

lifecycle_seq_band_15_max.description: Max row count for lifecycle_seq=15 (Awaiting Expiry). Catalog snapshot rows_count=24; 2-branch continuous formula (NULL=no upper bound, INFO-only). Recalibrated in E.5.

lifecycle_seq_band_16_min.description: Min row count for lifecycle_seq=16 (Appealed). Catalog snapshot rows_count=1; 2-branch continuous formula. Recalibrated in E.5.

lifecycle_seq_band_16_max.description: Max row count for lifecycle_seq=16 (Appealed). Catalog snapshot rows_count=1; 2-branch continuous formula (NULL=no upper bound, INFO-only). Recalibrated in E.5.

lifecycle_seq_band_17_max.description: Max row count for lifecycle_seq=17 (TLAB Appeal). Catalog snapshot rows_count=347; 2-branch continuous formula (NULL=no upper bound, INFO-only). Recalibrated in E.5.

lifecycle_seq_band_18_max.description: Max row count for lifecycle_seq=18 (OMB Appeal). Catalog snapshot rows_count=218; 2-branch continuous formula (NULL=no upper bound, INFO-only). Recalibrated in E.5.

lifecycle_seq_band_19_min.description: Min row count for lifecycle_seq=19 (Withdrawn). Catalog snapshot rows_count=904; 2-branch continuous formula. Recalibrated in E.5.

lifecycle_seq_band_19_max.description: Max row count for lifecycle_seq=19 (Withdrawn). Catalog snapshot rows_count=904; 2-branch continuous formula (NULL=no upper bound, INFO-only). Recalibrated in E.5.

lifecycle_seq_band_20_max.description: Max row count for lifecycle_seq=20 (Cancelled). Catalog snapshot rows_count=1; 2-branch continuous formula (NULL=no upper bound, INFO-only). Recalibrated in E.5.

lifecycle_seq_band_21_max.description: Max row count for lifecycle_seq=21 (Complete). Catalog snapshot rows_count=8; 2-branch continuous formula (NULL=no upper bound, INFO-only). Recalibrated in E.5.

lifecycle_seq_band_22_max.description: Max row count for lifecycle_seq=22 (Closed). Catalog snapshot rows_count=NULL; 2-branch continuous formula (NULL=no upper bound, INFO-only). Recalibrated in E.5.

lifecycle_seq_band_23_max.description: Max row count for lifecycle_seq=23 (Request Received). Catalog snapshot rows_count=1; 2-branch continuous formula (NULL=no upper bound, INFO-only). Recalibrated in E.5.

lifecycle_seq_band_24_min.description: Min row count for lifecycle_seq=24 (Application Received). Catalog snapshot rows_count=218; 2-branch continuous formula. Recalibrated in E.5.

lifecycle_seq_band_24_max.description: Max row count for lifecycle_seq=24 (Application Received). Catalog snapshot rows_count=218; 2-branch continuous formula (NULL=no upper bound, INFO-only). Recalibrated in E.5.

lifecycle_seq_band_25_min.description: Min row count for lifecycle_seq=25 (Application Acceptable). Catalog snapshot rows_count=465; 2-branch continuous formula. Recalibrated in E.5.

lifecycle_seq_band_25_max.description: Max row count for lifecycle_seq=25 (Application Acceptable). Catalog snapshot rows_count=465; 2-branch continuous formula (NULL=no upper bound, INFO-only). Recalibrated in E.5.

lifecycle_seq_band_26_min.description: Min row count for lifecycle_seq=26 (Open). Catalog snapshot rows_count=519; 2-branch continuous formula. Recalibrated in E.5.

lifecycle_seq_band_26_max.description: Max row count for lifecycle_seq=26 (Open). Catalog snapshot rows_count=519; 2-branch continuous formula (NULL=no upper bound, INFO-only). Recalibrated in E.5.

lifecycle_seq_band_27_min.description: Min row count for lifecycle_seq=27 (Active). Catalog snapshot rows_count=24; 2-branch continuous formula. Recalibrated in E.5.

lifecycle_seq_band_27_max.description: Max row count for lifecycle_seq=27 (Active). Catalog snapshot rows_count=24; 2-branch continuous formula (NULL=no upper bound, INFO-only). Recalibrated in E.5.

lifecycle_seq_band_28_max.description: Max row count for lifecycle_seq=28 (Not Started). Catalog snapshot rows_count=NULL; 2-branch continuous formula (NULL=no upper bound, INFO-only). Recalibrated in E.5.

lifecycle_seq_band_29_max.description: Max row count for lifecycle_seq=29 (Not Started - Express). Catalog snapshot rows_count=92; 2-branch continuous formula (NULL=no upper bound, INFO-only). Recalibrated in E.5.

lifecycle_seq_band_30_max.description: Max row count for lifecycle_seq=30 (Under Review). Catalog snapshot rows_count=NULL; 2-branch continuous formula (NULL=no upper bound, INFO-only). Recalibrated in E.5.

lifecycle_seq_band_31_max.description: Max row count for lifecycle_seq=31 (Examination). Catalog snapshot rows_count=30; 2-branch continuous formula (NULL=no upper bound, INFO-only). Recalibrated in E.5.
